description: Fixture for the 'scheduled member outside its group's window' conflict warning. A scheduled group (grp, 12:00-13:00) with a member scheduled outside that window (outside, 03:00-04:00) and one inside it (inside, 12:15-12:45); a standalone scheduled playlist; a member of an unscheduled group (open_grp/open_member); and a nested chain (top_grp 12:00-13:00 -> mid_grp unscheduled -> deep_member 03:00-04:00). These expect_should_play cases validate each playlist's own schedule window; the group-schedule-conflict flag is asserted separately.
